case_title: PINES, LAWRENCE M VS BIGNALL, WENDY

docket_entries.description: W R I T ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO WENDY R. BIGNALL.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BIGNALL, WENDY HEARING SET FOR APR-11-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FILED COURT DATE IS 5/31/94 9:00 AM.
W R I T ISSUED TO SF. COUNTY AS TO DEFEND RETURNED FULLY SATISIFIED.
MAILED MOVAC COPY TO PLTF.AFTER FILING,FOUND ANOTH ER ADDRESS ON FORM,MAILED ANOTHER COPY THERE(ONE P OST ST#2100,SF,94104 C/O WILLIAM D.WHITMAN, ESQ).
IT IS SO ORDERED THAT THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $635.50 FILED BY PINES, LAWRENCE M AS TO DEFENDANT BIGNALL, WENDY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-25-1986 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PINES, LAWRENCE M RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIGNALL, WENDY $535.10 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $556.10 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $428.76 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT BIGNALL, WENDY
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED NOT KNOWN.

FOLDER NOT IN SHELF.PAPERS FILED TO ERA.
